prompt: TREeS restaurant concept mood board collage. Wynwood Miami luxury dining. Visual elements: lush indoor greenhouse with tropical plants hanging from ceiling, natural sunlight through massive floor-to-ceiling windows, 70s retro bungalow warm wood interior with futuristic LED accent lighting, moroccan-style smoke lounge with velvet pillows and brass hookah, caribbean fusion food plating artistically on natural ceramic plates, live jazz musician on small stage with warm spotlights, raw juice bar with colorful pressed juices in glass bottles, christmas string lights creating constellation patterns on dark ceiling, outdoor patio with tropical landscaping and ambient lighting, diverse upscale clientele, murals and art installations. Color palette: deep greens, warm wood tones, brass gold accents, tropical colors. Aesthetic: nature meets future, premium but welcoming.
